ValidationRule.description: Populate SFA_Cap_Length when SFA Cap after Initial Term is filled
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(CPI__c, 'N/A (Master Terms Apply)')), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(CPI__c)) )), ISBLANK(TEXT(SFA_Cap_Length__c)), ISNEW() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the SFA Cap Length field. Since the SFA Cap after Initial Term field is populated on this contract
